growth_records.cite: Orsi, Enrico et al. Synergistic investigation of natural and synthetic C1-trophic microorganisms to foster a circular carbon economy. Nature Communications (2023). DOI:10.1038/s41467-023-42166-w. [PMC10590403]
growth_records.snippet: the evolved methylotrophic E. coli strain has a doubling time of 8 h, which is still far from the 3 h doubling time of the natural methylotroph Methylobacillus flagellatus.
growth_records.notes: Doubling time td = 3 h for the natural methylotroph M. flagellatus (methanol substrate) is CITED from ref 87 within this Perspective article; not measured here. Derived growth rate mu = ln2/td = 0.6931/3 = 0.231 h^-1. is_experimental: not a primary measurement in this paper. No medium, temperature, pH, uptake or secretion rates given.
